# value

**Instance Property**

The raw value attribute of the element.

## Declaration

```swift
var value: Any? { get }
```

## Discussion

The exact type of `value` varies based on the type of the element.

## Value

- **placeholderValue**: The value displayed when the element has no value.
- **title**: The title attribute of the element.
- **label**: The label attribute of the element.
